_case: TIER GATE (§2.4, plan-check N1): when the runtime itself declares busy→idle, that is a tier-1 truth, not tier-3 mtime noise. Applying the 90s dwell here would keep showing `working` for 90s after the runtime said it stopped — exactly the 'unstable/untrustworthy state' symptom F-25 exists to remove. HYST_APPLIES_TO_TIER=(3,) makes this immediate.

ticks._tick: t1 — registry says idle 2s later → IMMEDIATE idle (no dwell, tier-1 wins)
